meaning: 路易(斯)维尔[美国肯塔基州北部城市]
examples: Business matters drew him to Louisville.
Leaders of the Southern states are meeting in Louisville.
I think a good example is the pedestrian mall in the Louisville Kentucky for instance.
Louisville was the Mecca for all those Davids trying to learn how to beat Goliaths.
If there were any team cosmically designed to spoil Kentucky's raucous romp, it was Louisville.
